action.name: Read
action.comment: Reads raw data information from objects.

input.param: A mutable buffer that will receive the data.
The Read action will write this parameter with the total number of bytes read into the Buffer.

action.name: Seek
action.comment: Move the read/write marker to a new position.
action.prototype: ERR acSeek(*Object, DOUBLE Offset, INT Position)

input.param: The desired offset to seek to, relative to the Position parameter.
The position that defines the starting point for Offset.
